hibernate-mapping.query: select job from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputJob job where job.jobSeq = ?
select job from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputJob job where job.statusID = ?
select job from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputJob job where job.statusID = ? and job.modifiedDate >= ? and job.modifiedDate <= ?
select job from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputJob job where job.statusID = ? and job.modifiedDate <= ?
select statusID from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputJob job where job.jobSeq = ?
hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select top 1 job.Output_Service_Job_Seq AS jobSeq FROM Output_Service_Job job WITH (ROWLOCK,XLOCK,READPAST) where job.osj_status_seq = :readyStatus and job.osj_queue_seq in (:destIds) and job.osj_queue_seq not in ( select osj_queue_seq from Output_Service_Job where osj_status_seq = :processStatus and osj_queue_seq in (:destIds)) order by job.osj_Modified_Dt asc

select top 1 job.Output_Service_Job_Seq AS jobSeq FROM Output_Service_Job job WITH (ROWLOCK,XLOCK,READPAST) where job.osj_status_seq = :status and job.osj_queue_seq in (:destIds) order by job.osj_Modified_Dt asc

select top 1 job.Output_Service_Job_Seq AS jobSeq FROM Output_Service_Job job WITH (ROWLOCK,XLOCK,READPAST) where job.osj_status_seq = :status and job.osj_queue_seq in (:destIds) and (job.Osj_ProcessingServer = :hostname or job.Osj_ProcessingServer is null) order by job.osj_Modified_Dt asc

select top 1 job.Output_Service_Job_Seq AS jobSeq FROM Output_Service_Job job WITH (ROWLOCK,XLOCK,READPAST) where job.osj_status_seq = :status and job.osj_queue_seq in (:destIds) and job.Osj_ProcessingServer = :hostname order by job.osj_Modified_Dt asc
UPDATE Output_Service_Job SET osj_status_seq = :status, osj_Modified_Dt = getDate(), Osj_ProcessingServer = :hostname WHERE Output_Service_Job_Seq in (:jobIds)

UPDATE Output_Service_Job SET osj_status_seq = :setStatus, osj_Modified_Dt = getDate(), Osj_ProcessingServer = null, Osj_OutputServerStatus_Details = :statusDetail WHERE Output_Service_Job_Seq in ( Select top 1 Output_Service_Job_Seq FROM Output_Service_Job WHERE osj_status_seq = :checkStatus and osj_queue_seq in (:destIds) and osj_Modified_Dt < DATEADD(minute, :minute, getDate()) )

UPDATE Output_Service_Job SET osj_status_seq = :setStatus, osj_Modified_Dt = getDate(), Osj_ProcessingServer = null, Osj_OutputServerStatus_Details = :statusDetail WHERE Output_Service_Job_Seq in ( Select top 1 Output_Service_Job_Seq FROM Output_Service_Job WHERE osj_status_seq in (:checkStatus) and osj_Modified_Dt < DATEADD(day, :day, getDate()) )

UPDATE Output_Service_Job SET osj_Modified_Dt = getDate(), Osj_ProcessingServer = null, Osj_OutputServerStatus_Details = :statusDetail WHERE Output_Service_Job_Seq in ( Select top 1 Output_Service_Job_Seq FROM Output_Service_Job WHERE osj_status_seq = :checkStatus and osj_queue_seq in (:destIds) and osj_Modified_Dt < DATEADD(minute, :minute, getDate()) )

select job.Output_Service_Job_Seq AS jobSeq, job.osj_Created_Dt AS createdDate, job.osj_Created_By_Seq AS createdBy, job.osj_Modified_Dt AS modifiedDate, job.osj_Modified_By_Seq AS modifiedBy, job.osj_Record_Version AS recordVersion, job.osj_Organization_Seq AS orgSeq, job.osj_job_id AS jobName, job.osj_submitted_by AS userName, job.osj_queue_seq AS destID, job.osj_status_seq AS statusID, job.osj_pages AS pages, job.osj_results AS resultsXML, job.osj_OutputServicerequest.query('declare default element namespace "http://eig.mckesson.com/xsd/2009/01"; data(/outputRequest/properties/property[key="jobDetails"]/value)') as jobDetails, job.Osj_OutputServerStatus_Details statusDetail FROM Output_Service_Job job

select job.Output_Service_Job_Seq AS jobSeq, job.osj_Created_Dt AS createdDate, job.osj_Created_By_Seq AS createdBy, job.osj_Modified_Dt AS modifiedDate, job.osj_Modified_By_Seq AS modifiedBy, job.osj_Record_Version AS recordVersion, job.osj_Organization_Seq AS orgSeq, job.osj_job_id AS jobName, job.osj_submitted_by AS userName, job.osj_queue_seq AS destID, job.osj_status_seq AS statusID, job.osj_pages AS pages, job.osj_results AS resultsXML, job.osj_OutputServicerequest.query('declare default element namespace "http://eig.mckesson.com/xsd/2009/01"; data(/outputRequest/properties/property[key="jobDetails"]/value)') as jobDetails, job.Osj_OutputServerStatus_Details statusDetail FROM Output_Service_Job job where osj_created_dt >= :T_FROM_DATE and osj_created_dt <= :T_TO_DATE
